creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2006-11-07 16:58:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/zend-framework   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/zend-framework/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  This is a port of the Zend Framework. The Zend Framework aims to
  provide an architecture for developing entire applications with no
  other library dependencies. This code will always be actively developed,
  tested, and supported by Zend and the PHP Collaboration Project.
  
  WWW: http://framework.zend.com/
  - Greg Larkin
  glarkin@sourcehosting.net
  
  PR:             ports/105094
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1595    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +88 -0     ports/www/zend-framework/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/zend-framework/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/www/zend-framework/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/zend-framework/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3993 -0   ports/www/zend-framework/pkg-plist (new)
